title: Lively Spiced Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A snappy, post‑workout Moroccan dish featuring mustard powder and a soffritto base, served from an agave leaf vessel.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a heavy‑bottom pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion, carrot, and celery, sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in garlic powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and mustard powder, cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add chicken thighs, brown on all sides, about 3 minutes per side.
Pour in chicken broth, bring to a gentle simmer, cover, and cook for 25 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
Remove the lid and simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes to reduce sauce.
Taste and season with salt and pepper if needed.
Garnish with freshly chopped cilantro and serve hot from an agave leaf vessel.
